header_info.title: Global Iron and Steel Tracker, March 2026 (V1)

entries.name: BF
entries.definition: Blast furnace

entries.name: BOF
entries.definition: Basic oxygen furnace

entries.name: DRI
entries.definition: Direct reduced iron

entries.name: EAF
entries.definition: Electric arc furnace

entries.name: HBI
entries.definition: Hot briquetted iron

entries.name: IF
entries.definition: Induction furnace

entries.name: mtpa
entries.definition: million tonnes per annum

entries.name: OHF
entries.definition: Open hearth furnace

entries.name: ttpa
entries.definition: thousand tonnes per annum

entries.name: Capacity
entries.definition: Capacity is the tonnes of crude iron or steel per annum that a steel plant is capable of producing.

entries.name: Production
entries.definition: Production is actual tonnes of crude iron or steel per annum produced at a plant in a given year.

entries.name: Note
entries.definition: Additional information about the research method and estimations of capacity and production are available on the GEM website at https://globalenergymonitor.org/projects/global-iron-and-steel-tracker/methodology/.

entries.name: Announced
entries.definition: Capacity that has been announced in corporate or governmental planning documents, but has not begun construction.

entries.name: Construction
entries.definition: Physical furnace structure building has begun.

entries.name: Operating
entries.definition: Furnace(s) currently operating and producing iron or steel.

entries.name: Operating pre-retirement
entries.definition: Company has announced plans to retire this iron or steelmaking capacity but it has not yet ceased operations.

entries.name: Mothballed
entries.definition: Iron or steelmaking has been idled such that it cannot be brought into operation immediately, but is not retired.

entries.name: Mothballed pre-retirement
entries.definition: Iron or steelmaking has been idled such that it cannot be brought into operation immediately. It has not yet been permanently retired/decommissioned, but the plant has announced plans to do so in the future.

entries.name: Retired
entries.definition: Furnace(s) ceased operations and is no longer has ability to produce iron or steel. If the capacity has been mothballed for over 5 years it is considered retired.

entries.name: Cancelled
entries.definition: Capacity previously planned or under development that has been cancelled. If no progress or announcements for announced capacity are made after 5 years it is considered to be cancelled.

entries.name: GEM plant ID
entries.definition: A unique GEM identifier is assigned to each plant. Uses format P10000012XXXX where P stands for "plant", and XXXX increases with every new plant added to the GIST.

entries.name: Plant name (English)
entries.definition: Common plant name for iron/steel plant in English language.

entries.name: Plant name (other language)
entries.definition: Common plant name for iron/steel plant in other language. Language indicated in parentheses following plant name.

entries.name: Other plant names (English)
entries.definition: Other plant names for iron/steel plant in English language.

entries.name: Other plant names (other language)
entries.definition: Other plant names for iron/steel plant in other language. Language indicated in parentheses following plant name.

entries.name: Owner (English)
entries.definition: Immediate owner/operator of iron/steel plant.

entries.name: Owner (other language)
entries.definition: Name of immediate owner/operator of iron/steel plant in other language.

entries.name: Owner GEM entity ID
entries.definition: Global Energy Monitor's entity ID for the owner/operator of the iron/steel plant.

entries.name: Owner PermID
entries.definition: PermID of the immediate owner/operator of the iron/steel plant.

entries.name: SOE status
entries.definition: Identifies an iron/steel plant as a "full" or "partial" state-owned enterprise (SOE)/government linked company (GLC).

entries.name: Parent (English)
entries.definition: Parent companies and respective ownership shares.

entries.name: Parent GEM entity ID
entries.definition: Global Energy Monitor's entity ID for the parent companies and respective ownership shares.

entries.name: Parent PermID
entries.definition: PermIDs of Parent companies and respective ownership shares.

entries.name: Location address
entries.definition: Physical address of iron/steel plant.

entries.name: Location address (other language)
entries.definition: Physical address of iron/steel plant in local language.

entries.name: Municipality
entries.definition: Municipality (city, village, town).

entries.name: Subnational unit
entries.definition: Subnational unit (province, state).

entries.name: Country/area
entries.definition: Country or territory.

entries.name: Region
entries.definition: WEO region.

entries.name: Coordinates
entries.definition: Coordinates of iron/steel plant.

entries.name: Coordinate accuracy
entries.definition: Coordinate accuracy defined as "exact" = location confirmed via satellite imagery, "approximate" = location estimated or undefined.

entries.name: GEM wiki page
entries.definition: Link to GEM wiki page.

entries.name: Plant age
entries.definition: Age of plant in years.

entries.name: Announced date
entries.definition: Date of announcement/proposal of iron/steel plant in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

entries.name: Construction date
entries.definition: Date that construction on the iron/steel plant began in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

entries.name: Start date
entries.definition: Date that the plant began producing iron/steel in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

entries.name: Pre-retirement announcement date
entries.definition: Date the company announced its plans to retire the plant in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

entries.name: Idled date
entries.definition: Date that iron/steel plant stops iron or steel production, but has not been disassembled or permanently closed, in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

entries.name: Retired date
entries.definition: Date that iron/steel plant was permanently closed, either after being disassembled or after a period of inactivity (after 5 years of “mothballed”), in the format YYYY-MM-DD.

entries.name: Ferronickel capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant-level capacity for ferronickel (ttpa).

entries.name: Sinter plant capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant-level capacity for sinter (ttpa).

entries.name: Coking plant capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant level capacity for coke (ttpa).

entries.name: Pelletizing plant capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant level capacity for pellets (ttpa).

entries.name: Category steel product
entries.definition: Categorizes steel products as "crude", "semi-finished", or "finished rolled" steel products.

entries.name: Steel products
entries.definition: Lists steel products produced at plant. Not comprehensive.

entries.name: Steel sector end users
entries.definition: Steel sector end user market. Categories are "automotive", "building and infrastructure", "energy", "steel packaging", "transport", "tools and machinery".

entries.name: Workforce size
entries.definition: Number of workers at the plant.

entries.name: ISO 14001
entries.definition: Certification year for current ISO 14001 environmental management certification. Plants known to be certified but with unknown year of certification enter "yes". Plants with previous certification that appears expired enter "expired".

entries.name: ISO 50001
entries.definition: Certification year for current ISO 50001 environmental management certification. Plants known to be certified but with unknown year of certification enter "yes". Plants with previous certification that appears expired enter "expired".

entries.name: ResponsibleSteel certification
entries.definition: Certification month and year for current ResponsibleSteel certification.

entries.name: Main production equipment
entries.definition: Lists the main iron and steel production equipment operating at the plant from the following list: BF, DRI, BOF, EAF, IF, other/unspecified steel, other/unspecified iron.

entries.name: Power source
entries.definition: Information about plant power system/source or utility that plant provides power to, if known.

entries.name: Iron ore source
entries.definition: Mine and/or company providing iron ore for iron/steel production, if known.

entries.name: Met coal source
entries.definition: Mine and/or company providing metallurgical coal for iron/steel production, if known.

entries.name: GEM plant ID
entries.definition: See definition above.

entries.name: Plant name (English)
entries.definition: See definition above.

entries.name: Plant name (other language)
entries.definition: See definition above.

entries.name: Country/area
entries.definition: See definition above.

entries.name: Main production equipment
entries.definition: Lists the main iron and steel production equipment at the plant corresponding to the row's operating status, from the following list: BF, DRI, BOF, EAF, IF, other/unspecified steel, other/unspecified iron.

entries.name: Status
entries.definition: Operating status of the plant. Categories are "announced", "construction", "operating", "operating pre-retirement", "mothballed", "mothballed pre-retirement", "cancelled", and "retired".

entries.name: Start date
entries.definition: Date that the plant began producing iron/steel in the format YYYY-MM-DD. For announced or construction capacity, this is the earliest start date of any units under development.

entries.name: Nominal crude steel capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant-level capacity across all steelmaking processes (ttpa).

entries.name: Nominal BOF steel capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant-level capacity for steel produced by BOF route (ttpa).

entries.name: Nominal EAF steel capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant-level capacity for steel produced by EAF route (ttpa).

entries.name: Nominal IF steel capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant-level capacity for steel produced by IF route (ttpa).

entries.name: Other/unspecified steel capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant-level capacity for steel produced by technology that is not tracked in the GIST (i.e. induction furnace) or for which the production route is unknown.

entries.name: Nominal iron capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant-level operating capacity across all ironmaking processes (ttpa).

entries.name: Nominal BF capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant-level capacity for iron produced by BF route (ttpa).

entries.name: Nominal DRI capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant-level capacity for iron produced by DRI route (ttpa).

entries.name: Other/unspecified iron capacity (ttpa)
entries.definition: Plant-level capacity for iron produced by technology that is not tracked in the GIST (i.e. smelting reduction) or for which the production route is unknown.

entries.name: "Plant Production" tab
entries.definition: Yearly Production provides time series data of reported production of iron and steel. Each plant has several rows representing summed production via each technology type (e.g. BF, BOF, EAF, etc.). "N/A" indicates that the plant does not have this type of iron/steel unit. "Unknown" indicates that the plant does have this type of iron/steel unit, but the production amount was not found.

entries.name: GEM plant ID
entries.definition: See definition above.

entries.name: Plant name (English)
entries.definition: See definition above.

entries.name: Type of production
entries.definition: The category or technology route of the reported production. Options include: Crude steel production (ttpa), EAF steel production (ttpa), BOF steel production (ttpa), IF steel production (ttpa), Other/Unknown steel production (ttpa), Iron production (ttpa), BF iron production (ttpa), DRI iron production (ttpa), and Other/Unknown iron production (ttpa). Crude steel production and iron production are the sum total production values for all technology routes at the plant.
Plant-level production in 2019 (fiscal year 2020) in thousands of metric tonnes.
Plant-level production in 2020 (fiscal year 2021) in thousands of metric tonnes.
Plant-level production in 2021 (fiscal year 2022) in thousands of metric tonnes.
Plant-level production in 2022 (fiscal year 2023) in thousands of metric tonnes.
Plant-level production in 2023 (fiscal year 2024) in thousands of metric tonnes.
Plant-level production in 2024 (fiscal year 2025) in thousands of metric tonnes.
Plant-level production in 2025 (fiscal year 2026) in thousands of metric tonnes.
